app.name: Executo
app.mailpit_hint: Development email is available in Mailpit

profile.title: Your profile
profile.intro: Review your account, verify your email, and request password reset messages.
profile.security_copy: Keep your email verified and your recovery path current so account access stays reliable.
profile.identity_intro: Core account details are shown here for quick reference across your daily work.
profile.edit_name_intro: Update your display name. Relevant administrators will be notified of the change.
profile.name_save_error: The name could not be saved right now.
profile.name: Name
profile.verify_email_intro: Request a verification email if this account still needs confirmation.
profile.verification_required: You are signed in, but your email still needs verification. Send a verification email below to continue.
profile.verification_confirmed: Your email has been verified successfully.
profile.verification_sent: If this account still needs verification, a confirmation email has been sent.
profile.verification_error: The verification email could not be sent right now.
profile.password_reset_intro: Send a password reset email to your inbox, then continue from the link you receive.
profile.password_reset_sent: If this account exists, a password reset email has been sent.
profile.password_reset_error: The password reset email could not be sent right now.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Choose how language, dates, and numbers should appear for your account.
preferences.form_intro: These settings change how the interface formats dates, numbers, and table sizes for your account.
preferences.no_changes: There are no changes to save.
preferences.save_error: Preferences could not be saved right now.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unknown: A change was made to your account.

dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.load_error: District data could not be loaded right now.
dashboard.no_districts: You currently do not have access to any district.
dashboard.default_district_missing: To use quick actions, set a default district in your preferences.

operations.save_error: The data could not be saved right now.

user_management.title: User management
user_management.intro: Review district members, adjust roles, and invite new users from one workspace.
user_management.app_admin_scope: App admin view: you can switch districts and manage users in any district.
user_management.district_admin_scope: District admin view: you can manage users only in the current district.
user_management.load_error: Users could not be loaded right now.
user_management.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage users in this district.
user_management.role_save_error: The role could not be updated right now.
user_management.remove_error: The user could not be removed right now.
user_management.invite_intro: Add an existing user account to {district} and choose the district role.
user_management.invite_error: The user could not be added right now.
user_management.confirm_remove_message: Remove {user} from this district? This action cannot be undone from this screen.
user_management.empty: No users are assigned to this district yet.
user_management.empty_filtered: No users match the current search or filter.

district.load_error: The district could not be loaded right now.

customers.title: Customers
customers.load_error: Customers could not be loaded right now.
customers.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, or code
customers.empty: No customers in this district yet.
customers.empty_filtered: No customers match the current search.

customer_detail.load_error: The customer could not be loaded right now.
customer_detail.no_debts: No debts recorded for this customer.

debt_detail.title: Case no. {number}

payment_list.load_error: Payments could not be loaded right now.
payment_list.create_error: The payment could not be saved right now.
payment_list.update_error: The payment could not be updated right now.
payment_list.delete_error: The payment could not be deleted right now.
payment_list.no_payments: No payments recorded for this debt.
payment_list.confirm_delete_message: Remove this payment? This cannot be undone.

hero.title: Access the customer and debt workspace with a calmer, more deliberate flow.
hero.body: Sign in, register, or restore access using the same operational shell used for district administration. New accounts stay unattached until an app admin or district admin assigns access.

cards.secure_body: New accounts require email verification before they can sign in.
cards.locale_body: Latvian stays the default, with English available for users who need it.
cards.access_body: After registration, access is granted by app admins or district admins.

hero.note_body: Self-registration creates a user account only. District membership is added later by an authorized administrator.

shared.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_too_short: The password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.link_invalid: The link is incomplete or invalid.

register.title: Create your account
register.body: Register your personal user account. A district admin or app admin can attach it to a district later.
register.verify_body: Confirm your address to activate sign-in access for the new account.
register.success: Registration received. Check your email for the verification link.
register.verification_resent: A new verification email has been sent if the account exists and is still unverified.
register.verification_link_ready: Your verification link is ready. Continue to confirm your email.
register.verification_link_missing: The verification link is incomplete or missing.
register.verified: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
register.verification_failed: The verification link is invalid or expired.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.body: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgot.success: If that account exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please follow the instructions in the email.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.token_ready: Enter a new password to continue.
reset.success: Your password has been updated successfully.
